calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR# 9225 (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-13-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-02-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Joanna Henricks, Roy Henricks' Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to Defendants' Form Interrogatories and Demand For Production Of Documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $300, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Dec-05-2008 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2008 Off Calendar: Trial De Novo Filed

TDN SWEEP
Off Calendar Nov-13-2008 Set For Trial On Mar-16-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Pl'S Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Sep-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Clifton Wong's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Discovery Responses is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $320, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
